name: m2ai-skills-pack
description: M2AI skills pack — strategy, prompt engineering, model routing, agent auditing, build pipelines, and workflow tooling.

plugins.name: m2ai-agent-architecture
plugins.description: 27 portable skills. Design, scaffold, and structure single- and multi-agent systems. Context hygiene, memory architecture, and world-model design.

plugins.name: m2ai-safety-verification
plugins.description: 27 portable skills. Guardrails, permissions, kill switches, and judgment gates before an agent acts. Hostile-reviewer passes and trust scoring before anything ships.

plugins.name: m2ai-agent-ops
plugins.description: 17 portable skills. Health checks, diagnostics, post-mortems, and run observability.

plugins.name: m2ai-model-economics
plugins.description: 28 portable skills. Routing, migration, cross-model review, and provider monitoring. Token spend, boot tax, and inference-cost exposure. Lock-in scoring, licensing, and exit-cost analysis.

plugins.name: m2ai-build-tooling
plugins.description: 37 portable skills. Spec-first build loops, code comprehension, and migration safety. Build, audit, convert, and maintain skills, tools, and MCP servers.

plugins.name: m2ai-strategy-analysis
plugins.description: 27 portable skills. Briefings, stress-tests, market signals, and workflow-investment scoring.

plugins.name: m2ai-workflow-content
plugins.description: 20 portable skills. Sessions, handoffs, recall, calendar, and remote access. Image and video prompt engineering and shorts pipelines.
